phase.title: Planning docs baseline
phase.goal: PROJECT, ROADMAP, and REQUIREMENTS are aligned with DungeonBreak and Narrative Engine; Phase 01 has a clear context (desired outcome, constraints, non-goals) and at least one plan with concrete tasks; TASK-REGISTRY or phase plans reflect the task breakdown.
phase.plans: Use planning CLI (planning snapshot, phase PLAN/SUMMARY) to generate.

phase.title: Planning docs cleanup and narrative state-space simulations
phase.goal: PRD and key decisions live in .planning; general docs/ are not extended. Simulation notebooks in `notebooks/` visualize the 3D narrative state space, saliency, dialog triggering, and Verlet+constraints so we can understand and communicate how the system will behave—no game code.
phase.plans: Use planning CLI for phase plans.

phase.title: Narrative Engine first slice (Verlet + constraints)
phase.goal: Verlet integration and constraint application (per-axis min/max, reproject old_p) are implemented and unit-tested so narrative state stays within bounds. See `.planning/DECISIONS.xml` (Narrative Engine) and `.planning/REQUIREMENTS.xml#implementation-roadmap.md`.
phase.plans: TBD (run `forge-loop plan-phase 3` when ready).
phase.status: Superseded (archived after Escape the Dungeon pivot)

phase.title: Narrative Engine – dialog selection and integration
phase.goal: Dialog/storylet selection uses entity position and dialog Location (saliency); integration point for DialogComponent and/or Yarn Spinner is defined and implemented to a first testable slice.
phase.plans: TBD.
phase.status: Superseded (archived after Escape the Dungeon pivot)

phase.title: Docs fold into planning and notebook tooling
phase.goal: docs/ contains only image-catalog (and images). Game PRD, design decisions, and implementation roadmap folded into .planning. Notebook tooling: venv + check/install + JupyterLab from root; no single-notebook run commands. Notebooks are documentation (entities/vectors/dialogue in same space; threshold and options for follow-up).
phase.plans: Use planning CLI for phase plans.

phase.title: Lab setup (uv, lab command) and notebook improvements
phase.goal: Single entry `npm run lab`; one main notebook (**dungeonbreak-narrative.ipynb**) that teaches axis semantics (Courage, Loyalty, Hunger), dialogue locations by *meaning*, how Kaiza reaches options (training, dialog, forces), saliency/threshold, Verlet, and time simulation—DRY, explicit naming, no arbitrary vectors. Doc images embedded; GDC/reference links in .planning. Fast, clone-and-run setup.
phase.plans: Use planning CLI for phase plans.

phase.title: Escape the Dungeon (adventurelib base + modular architecture)
phase.goal: Define and implement **Escape the Dungeon** as a modular Python/Jupyter dungeon crawler starting at depth 12 as Kael, with level/chapter/act progression, NPC background simulation, quest + item systems, and embeddings-driven trait updates.
phase.plans: Use planning CLI for phase plans.

phase.title: Vector-space rooms, dialogue ranges, and simulation clarity
phase.goal: Deepen Escape the Dungeon simulation with explicit `Dungeon/Level/Room` objects (50 rooms per level), room+item vectors that influence entities per turn, and dialogue clusters/options gated by vector distance and room state.
phase.plans: Use planning CLI for phase plans.

phase.title: Cutscenes, action gating, skills, and livestream fame economy
phase.goal: Add a clear presentation and decision layer on top of the simulation: cutscene popups for major events, prerequisite-based action/dialogue filtering, skill vectors for emergent builds, and livestream gameplay with `Fame` gain and `Effort` spend (10 effort per turn).
phase.plans: `09-01` implemented; run phase verification (planning workflow).

phase.title: Entity parity, factions, and emergent pressure systems
phase.goal: Move from prototype AI behavior to full emergent simulation parity: same legal action model for player/NPCs, dense room composition (treasure/rune forge), spawn pressure, faction/reputation lethality gates, companion recruitment, rumor spread, and level curves.
phase.requirements: [REQ-23, REQ-24, REQ-25, REQ-26, REQ-27, REQ-28, REQ-29, REQ-30, REQ-31, REQ-32]
phase.plans: `10-01` implemented; run phase verification (planning workflow).

phase.title: Content scale, archetype compass, and balancing
phase.goal: Expand authored content and balancing around emergent systems: large skill trees/evolution options, archetype headings/class textures, broader action/dialogue/item packs, and stability/performance tuning for long simulations.
phase.plans: `11-01` implemented (data-driven content packs, archetype compass runtime wiring, balancing harness/reporting).

phase.title: Terminal binary packaging and release automation
phase.goal: Publish Escape the Dungeon as downloadable terminal game binaries with a repeatable CI pipeline for tests, build artifacts, and tag-triggered releases.
phase.plans: `12-01` implemented; run phase verification (planning workflow).

phase.title: Browser playable 3-column game UX (`/play`)
phase.goal: Ship a browser-playable TypeScript runtime in docs-site at `/play` with a 3-column button-first interface (actions/feed/status), Assistant UI feed presentation, and blocking cutscene queue.
phase.requirements: [REQ-36, REQ-37, REQ-38, REQ-39, REQ-40, REQ-41, REQ-42, REQ-43, REQ-44, REQ-45, REQ-46]
phase.depends: Phase 10+ systems stable; docs-site build/deploy stable.
phase.plans: `13-01..13-06` initial browser runtime and gating. Recovery loops: `13-07` pivot docs/contracts, `13-08` UI rebuild, `13-09` parity presentation + tests, `13-10` release closeout.

phase.title: Browser parity closure and content scaling
phase.goal: Close remaining parity and gameplay-clarity gaps with a no-grid combat simulation, deterministic 25-turn reference run (single canonical seed), misinformation-aware deed memory, and reusable cross-language data contracts in TypeScript runtime.
phase.requirements: [REQ-37, REQ-38, REQ-40, REQ-47, REQ-48, REQ-49, REQ-50, REQ-51, REQ-52, REQ-53, REQ-54, REQ-55, REQ-56, REQ-57, REQ-58, REQ-59]
phase.plans: `14-01` planning + DoD draft, `14-02` contracts/formulas + simulation implementation, `14-03` deterministic replay and tests, `14-04` performance/reporting closure.

phase.title: TypeScript Cutover and `DungeonBreak/engine` Package
phase.goal: Remove Python gameplay runtime and notebooks from active development immediately, retain `npm run lab` and install helpers for TypeScript workflows, and ship an installable package (`DungeonBreak/engine`) with bundled game data and an out-of-the-box React component.
phase.requirements: [REQ-08, REQ-60, REQ-61, REQ-62, REQ-63, REQ-64, REQ-65, REQ-66, REQ-67]
phase.depends: Phase 13 complete; executes in parallel with late Phase 14 closure.
phase.plans: `15-01` planning/inventory, `15-02` removal cutover, `15-03` helper retargeting, `15-04` package extraction + CI/release wiring.

phase.title: Publish hardening for browser package release (GitHub Releases)
phase.goal: Harden GitHub-release package/browser operations with stricter CI quality bars, semantic tag validation, automated release notes, smoke replay packs, and deterministic packaged-tarball integration checks.
phase.plans: `16-01` implemented.

phase.title: Content production and long-run balancing loops
phase.goal: Scale authored gameplay content (skills/dialogue/items/events/quests) while preserving deterministic behavior and performance under long-run simulations.
phase.plans: `17-01` contract lock + long-run suite/report baseline (complete), `17-02` content expansion (complete), `17-03` pressure/perf tuning (complete), `17-04` verification and summary (complete).

phase.title: Deterministic MCP playthrough and interface
phase.goal: Provide a stable MCP machine interface and dense deterministic playthrough coverage for tooling, regression, and report generation.
phase.plans: `18-01` baseline MCP interface and local installer wiring (complete), `18-02` dense deterministic playthrough + regression + presenter/MCP parity verification (complete).

phase.title: Assistant Frame Window-Agent Support and Default Remote MCP
phase.goal: Add Assistant Frame support to browser `/play` so window agents can interact through a structured bridge, keep remote MCP (`/api/mcp`) enabled by default for signed-in users, and publish version-coupled play/test reports with each build.
phase.requirements: [REQ-81, REQ-82, REQ-83, REQ-84, REQ-85, REQ-86, REQ-87, REQ-88]
phase.plans: `19-01` planning/contracts update (complete), `19-02` Assistant Frame integration + tests (complete), `19-03` default-on remote MCP auth/hardening/docs + versioned report publishing (complete).

phase.title: Report schema normalization and streamable event ledgers
phase.goal: Keep report fidelity while reducing memory and payload pressure by defaulting to reference-oriented ledger artifacts and adding JSONL stream iteration for timeline viewers.
phase.plans: `20-01` policy/docs realignment (no LLM chooser scope), `20-02` JSONL external ledger stream format + viewer iteration support.

phase.title: Tooling PRD, gameplay analysis, and report viewer
phase.goal: Tooling PRD; metric definitions (replayability, excitement, emergent); playthrough analyzer; report viewer on docs site.
phase.plans: Tooling PRD + metrics, playthrough analyzer (`playthrough-analyzer.ts`), report viewer route `/reports` or `/play/reports`.

phase.title: Action policies as static data
phase.goal: Action policies in `contracts/data/action-policies.json`; agent-play and engine NPCs use policies instead of hardcoded behavior.
phase.plans: `action-policies.json`, schema + export from engine, agent-play reads policy; future: `simulateNpcTurns` accepts policy ID.

phase.title: KAPLAY single-file HTML build
phase.goal: Standalone single-file HTML game with KAPLAY; first-person text mode + ASCII grid mode; screen-based UI (Navigation, Combat, Rune Forge, Inventory, Dialogue); bundle engine + game logic; GitHub release artifact.
phase.plans: `packages/kaplay-demo`, first-person scene, ASCII grid with screen swaps (Navigation → Combat → Action menu → Rune Forge, etc.); UI components per `.planning/REQUIREMENTS.xml#UI-COMPONENT-REGISTRY.md`; `build-standalone.ts` → single HTML; GitHub release workflow.

phase.title: Docs-site deploy reliability and Vercel-parity CI loop
phase.goal: Keep docs-site continuously publishable by adding parity build checks with retained logs, hardening local package bootstrap paths used by Vercel, and removing recurring build-time regressions.
phase.plans: `24-01` parity workflow with uploaded logs, `24-02` engine dist bootstrap on install, `24-03` engine contracts export regression fix, `24-04` clean build output + lockfile refresh, `24-05` llms route response hardening.

phase.title: Engine/KAPLAY parity gaps (inventory action slice)
phase.goal: Close early gameplay parity gaps by adding explicit inventory actions in the engine (`use_item`, `equip_item`, `drop_item`) and wiring KAPLAY inventory UI controls directly to those engine contracts.
phase.plans: `29-01` inventory action contract + execution/availability, `29-02` KAPLAY inventory action wiring, `29-03` replay fixture/hash refresh.

phase.title: Kaplay first-person UI simplification
phase.goal: Simplify first-person interface; fix unclosed tags; align layout reuse (header/left/right/center).
phase.plans: `30-01` Quick View → Utility, remove tabs, default grid; `30-02` escape keyboard hints (unclosed tags fix), layout reuse doc; `30-03` Journal, Combat gate, contextual actions; `30-04` 3-column layout (left nav, center map, right journal); `30-05` first-person 3-column layout, shared layout constants.

phase.title: Canonical identifiers and content structure
phase.goal: Engine as single source of truth for actionType and roomFeature; no magic strings; structured context (roomFeature in status) instead of prose parsing.
phase.plans: `31-01` engine exports PLAYER_ACTION_TYPES/ROOM_FEATURES, status(roomFeature), AGENTS.md convention, KAPLAY/engine-mcp consume; `31-02` Action vs Option mental model doc.

phase.title: Next parity or polish
phase.goal: TBD — Phase 29 completion (Rune Forge, combat, dialogue) or reporting tooling.
phase.plans: `32-01` TBD — run discuss-phase when ready.

phase.title: KAPLAY atomic component library baseline
phase.goal: Establish the KAPLAY UI library as the default build path using atomic design (`atoms`, `molecules`, `organisms`) with tokenized theme usage and no scene-local color literals for new work.
phase.plans: `44-01` atomic primitives + scene shell refit + key hint molecule + verification; `44-02` document component workflow referencing PRD/GRD directives, embed improvement/self-check questions, and keep task/decision/state docs lean; `44-05` Space Explorer UI naming/ID pass with context-colored help affordances; `44-06` Visualization toolbar consolidation (reachability/deltas + distance algorithm + top-k controls); `44-07` Visualization viewport parity pass (Deltas as primary view mode, entity tile removal, reachability badges in header); `44-08` Single-step space selection (move Combined into Space View, remove Content Space step, add Skill/Dialogue/Archetype spaces); `44-09` Space vector authoring controls (remove behavior lens, space-scoped feature vectors incl. Fame/Awareness/Guile, define-feature modal, movement vector feature assignment); `44-10` Model schema visibility popup (active Kael model indicator + inspectable model schema list); `44-11` Hierarchical model selector (react-arborist tree grouped by model namespace); `44-12` Model instance hierarchy + canonical serialization (Kael as child instance under model, canonical toggle, serialized content bindings); `44-13` Duplicate feature key fix + remove bottom model schema builder panel; `44-14` Performance refactor with zustand+immer state slicing and tree authoring enhancements (language views, base labeling, inline canonical asset creation); `44-15` Persisted authoring session + drag migration scripting + hover-copy code UX; `44-16` Model inheritance/default-value handoff (namespace-level `(base)` selector, Feature Refs default editing, representative TS/C++/C# file list output); `44-17` Control cleanup (remove 3D marker grouping control, simplify Space Features, rename Space View to Model Space View); `44-18` Replace space cards with schema-aligned model-space dropdown and promote Model Space View as section label; `44-19` Add explicit model selector from model-schema list and model creation directly in Model Tree modal; `44-20` Remove duplicate model picker in favor of Model Tree selection and add checkbox multi-model overlays in 3D; `44-21` Remove Model Space control section and split Features by inheritance layers (base/class), with automatic inheritance-level model-space overlays; `44-22` Add reusable `combatstats` schema defaults and explicit entity/item inheritance with schema-file generation + model info affordances; `44-23` Flatten Stat Control and remove movement/merge panels, add `currencystats` -> `currency` model inheritance and stat-vector defaults; `44-24` Add pack/report identity binding + hash mismatch UI and canonical-first model selectors, and publish play-report-binding artifacts in CI/release workflows; `44-25` Introduce `content-pack.manifest.v1` generation with schema/code stubs and pipeline artifact publishing, plus authoritative play-report pack-binding fallback; `44-26` Rename the model schema modal to Content Creator and add tree-driven Info Panel details with JSON Schema rendering.

phase.title: Grid and first-person screen refit completion
phase.goal: Move all playable grid/first-person screens onto shared organisms and templates (left command panel, center content surface, right room/journal surface).
phase.plans: `45-01` complete refit of combat/action/rune forge/inventory/dialogue + docs sync.

phase.title: Human-playable input UX hardening
phase.goal: Improve discoverability and ergonomics of controls for keyboard + mouse players: stable key legends, clear command naming, and reduced mode confusion.
phase.plans: `46-01` key legend standardization, command wording pass, interaction polish + smoke capture.

phase.title: Agent-play and standalone parity hardening
phase.goal: Ensure standalone build and agent-play contracts remain in parity through deterministic smoke tests and explicit command surface checks.
phase.plans: `47-01` engine build/typecheck + engine-mcp typecheck/parity smoke + standalone build gating.

phase.title: Release-ready text-graphics polish
phase.goal: Final pass on text-graphics readability, panel spacing, and scene consistency with no media assets while keeping deterministic behavior unchanged.
phase.plans: `48-01` polish checklist + capture artifacts + release notes draft.

phase.title: Dungeon Explorer spatial visualization
phase.goal: Visualize dungeon physical space: room transforms, item/entity placement, and per-turn paths.
phase.plans: `49-01` serialize spatial dungeon layout and render interactive explorer.

phase.title: AI integration architecture and schema-authoring workflows
phase.goal: Ship working AI authoring inside Space Explorer: chat interface available in-app, Codex-powered model/stat/content schema editing, canonical asset generation, and serializable content-bundle outputs (not schema-only).
phase.requirements: [REQ-81, REQ-82, REQ-83, REQ-84, REQ-89, REQ-90, User direction: in-Space-Explorer chat authoring + canonical assets + bundle-serializable content]
phase.depends: Phase 49 planning baseline and Phase 19 remote MCP/auth behavior.
phase.plans: `50-01..50-06` planning baseline complete. Reopened execution: `50-07` formal product DoD + contract lock; `50-08` embed chat interface in Space Explorer with Codex session wiring; `50-09` chat-driven mutations for models/stats/content schema; `50-10` canonical data asset creation/editing from chat; `50-11` bundle serialization path for authored content (beyond schema stubs); `50-12` end-to-end verification + release gates.

phase.title: Content schema file test-mode authoring loop
phase.goal: Re-center Space Explorer around a JSON Schema-first Content Schema File workflow, add fresh-data test mode, and provide one-click bundle + playthrough + visualization loops for rapid authoring.
phase.requirements: [REQ-89, REQ-90, User direction: content schema file + test mode + fast playthrough loops + storage sync planning]
phase.depends: Phase 50 architecture baseline; Phase 40-44 content-pack authoring/build routes.
phase.plans: `51-01` rename schema UX to Content Schema File and add tree-driven schema info panel updates; `51-02` add Test Mode with one-click build bundle + browser playthrough generation and automatic pack binding in reports; `51-03` add storage integration plan for pull/push of bundles/reports via Supabase/S3-compatible backend with explicit API contracts; `51-04` refine header UX with shadcn switch, icon-first controls, title-adjacent report trigger, and multi-step loader for test-mode execution visibility; `51-05` replace react-arborist with a shadcn-style object tree, include all content objects (skills/dialogue/etc.), and add a lightweight object editor panel with OOP-first terminology.

phase.title: Unreal DLC content delivery pipeline and plugin integration
phase.goal: Deliver a production content-delivery pipeline for Unreal consumption: downloadable signed packs, schema/asset alignment guarantees, and an Unreal DLC plugin workflow that imports/validates/runtime-loads generated packs.
phase.requirements: [REQ-89, REQ-90, User direction: downloadable packs + Unreal plugin workflow + robust schema/asset alignment + secret handling]
phase.depends: Phase 50 authoring/chat baseline and Phase 51 content schema/test-mode workflow.
phase.plans: `52-01` planning/contracts baseline + submodule integration; `52-02` canonical content-pack transport contract (manifest, bundle, signatures, compatibility matrix); `52-03` Unreal plugin architecture and ingestion lifecycle; `52-04` secure secrets workflow (encrypted env serialization + local decrypt runtime); `52-05` end-to-end CI/CD (build/sign/publish + Unreal pull/import verification); `52-06` observability + rollback + support playbooks.

phase.title: Dolt lineage and authoring governance workflow
phase.goal: Define and implement the Dolt-centric authoring lineage workflow (patch history, branch/merge governance, promotion gates) as a dedicated phase that integrates with but does not block Supabase runtime distribution.
phase.requirements: [User direction: plan Dolt workflow as separate phase; preserve delivery velocity in phase 52]
phase.plans: `53-01` Dolt workflow contract (roles, branch strategy, merge rules, artifact promotion policy); `53-02` ingestion parity checks (Dolt patch source vs JSON inbox source equivalence); `53-03` operational docs + runbooks for content team and release engineers.

phase.title: RepoPlanner submodule and host integration
phase.goal: Planning (CLI, cockpit UI, APIs, .planning contract) lives in vendor/repo-planner submodule; host Next.js app imports a single component; styling via host theme tokens; Codex and loop CLI work unchanged.
phase.plans: `54-01` Add RepoPlanner submodule at vendor/repo-planner, document integration contract (simple component + theme + Codex/loop); migrate planning code into submodule and push; host wires thin route + CSS vars.
